# VetBridge USA

> VetBridge USA connects licensed international veterinarians from Mexico and Canada with understaffed veterinary clinics in the United States. We coordinate NAVLE exam preparation, state licensing, the USMCA TN visa (via independent immigration attorneys), and relocation end-to-end, backed by a 3-year placement guarantee.

## Key facts
- Veterinarian is a USMCA/TN-visa profession; Canadians can obtain TN status at the U.S. border, Mexicans at a U.S. consulate.
- FMVZ-UNAM graduates from 2011–2025 graduated during the school's AVMA accreditation period and follow an accelerated path (skip ECFVG).
- All Canadian veterinary schools are AVMA-accredited.
- ECFVG-certified veterinarians can begin practicing in New York on a limited permit (up to two years) while completing the NAVLE.

## Audiences
- Veterinarians (Spanish): https://www.vetbridgeusa.com/veterinarios
- Clinics hiring (English): https://www.vetbridgeusa.com/clinics

## Pages
- Home: https://www.vetbridgeusa.com/
- About: https://www.vetbridgeusa.com/about
- Blog: https://www.vetbridgeusa.com/blog
- Contact: https://www.vetbridgeusa.com/contact

## Note
VetBridge USA is a recruitment and coordination service, not a law firm. Visa work is performed by independent immigration attorneys. Outcomes depend on individual eligibility and the relevant authorities.
